vulnerabilities.description: Lack of Infrastructure Security: Helmet and CORS with whitelist not implemented.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement Helmet for setting HTTP headers and configure CORS with a whitelist of trusted origins.
Integrate a rate-limiting middleware to control the number of requests per defined time frame.

vulnerabilities.description: Potential for Sensitive Data Exposure in Logs.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure no sensitive data such as JWT secrets or environment variables are logged by redefining the logging structure to exclude such data.
Ensure all user inputs are sanitized to prevent injection attacks, using libraries like Joi or express-validator.

vulnerabilities.description: Missing Prepared Statements/ORM for Data Safety.
vulnerabilities.fix: Utilize an ORM or prepared statements to handle database queries, reducing the risk of SQL Injection.
